savedSpot.title: Saved Spot
savedSpot.description: Represents a physical location saved to the user's personal VibeList directory

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved the spot

spotId.description: The standard spot ID matching SPOTS static catalog

savedAt.description: The date-time when the spot was saved

liveTip.title: Live Tip
liveTip.description: Community generated micro-reviews or vibe tips pinned to a specific hotspot

id.description: Unique identifier of the community tip

spotId.description: Target Physical hot-spot identifier being commented on

handle.description: Gen-Z themed social handle of the author

isVerified.description: Whether the reviewer is a verified local selector

timestamp.description: Format description of when the post was added

isHype.description: Whether the tip is a Hype vote or Mid vote

users/{userId}/savedSpots/{spotId}.description: Individual spot items preserved on personal VibeList transport cards

liveTips/{tipId}.description: Community live streams of real-time spot evaluations
